description: IonMonkey MGuardShape::foldsTo did not check the dependency chain before folding away the guard, allowing growSlotsPure to be called with a stale shape after Int8Array.reduceRight invoked a setter that shifted an array out from under the IC. Hits the numDynamicSlots() MOZ_ASSERT at vm/JSObject-inl.h:36. sec-high. Fix: check dependency in MGuardShape::foldsTo (git 2fa42593dec7).
